content_pillars: Artisanal Craftsmanship & Behind-the-Scenes (The sourdough process, pastry lamination, raw premium ingredients)
Community & Experience (Weekend workshops, customer stories, college campus connection)
Visual Indulgence (Aesthetic close-ups of best-sellers like the Red Velvet Cheesecake and Chocolate Croissants)
Convenience & Services (Promoting same-day delivery in Pune, custom cake consultations, and corporate gifting)
target_audience: College Students (Looking for aesthetic, affordable treats, study snacks, and hangouts)
Working Professionals (Targeted for corporate gifting, premium weekend workshops, and convenient deliveries)
Local Pune Families (In need of high-quality custom celebration cakes and weekend family treats)
Premium Food Connoisseurs (Individuals prioritizing artisanal quality, fresh ingredients, and fine baking over budget)
posting_goals: Increase footfall from the nearby college campus through highly shareable, aesthetic content
Drive consistent bookings for the weekend bakery workshops
Position the brand as Pune's go-to premium choice for custom birthday and celebration cakes
Boost order volume for same-day delivery services and seasonal corporate gifting boxes
Build long-term trust by highlighting the brand's premium ingredients and legacy since 2020
marketing_opportunities: Festive Corporate Campaigns: Capitalizing on Diwali and Christmas by heavily promoting seasonal bakery boxes
College-centric Micro-campaigns: Special offers for exam weeks, graduation seasons, and back-to-college periods
Local Cafe Cross-Promotions: Collaborating with partner cafes to run co-branded social media giveaways and pop-ups
Review-driven Social Proof: Transforming the 500+ online reviews into highly-engaging social media trust signals
recommended_content_directions: Baking ASMR & Process Reels: High-definition short-form videos capturing the satisfying crunch of croissants and slicing of Garlic Sourdough Bread
Before & After Custom Cake Reels: Highlighting the journey from a client's concept/sketch to the finalized premium celebration cake
Workshop Diaries: Authentic, emotional recap videos of weekend workshop attendees laughing, learning, and tasting their creations
Interactive Student Stories: Weekly polls and Q&As tailored to college life, such as 'Choose your study fuel: Croissant or Cookie?'
Gift Box Unboxing: Highly aesthetic, sensory-focused unboxing videos of the upcoming seasonal Diwali/Christmas boxes to showcase premium packaging
additional_recommendations: Develop a student-friendly mini-menu or loyalty program to keep premium items accessible to the neighboring college audience
Optimize local SEO and Google My Business utilizing the 500+ reviews to capture 'best sourdough' and 'custom cakes Pune' search queries
Create a streamlined, automated WhatsApp catalog for the same-day delivery service to reduce ordering friction
